'''Sidris Kolb''' was a [[Scientist/Legends|meteorologist]] assigned to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] [[Senate Select Committee for Refugees|SELCORE]] staff on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. He was constantly at odds with colleague [[Aj Koenes]] over materials required by both their projects.<ref name="BP" />

{{Char-stub}}
